# Bug-Free Travel Guide Contribution

Thank you for helping make this the world's best resource for bug-phobic travelers! Before submitting, please read our [Contributing Guide](guides/contributing.md).

## Checklist
- [ ] I have cross-referenced with at least **2 independent sources**
- [ ] I have checked my destination isn't already covered in [guides/research-web-destination-guide.md](guides/research-web-destination-guide.md)
- [ ] I have included a **Bug Safety Score (0–10)** and explained the science behind why it's bug-free
- [ ] I have provided specific **seasonal safety data** with exact months (not just "winter" or "summer")
